meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Scale Your Freelance Agency Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Learn to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your freelance workflow and scale your development business today.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to win clients; you need an automated workflow. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-leverage engine that generates content, builds landing pages, and manages your brand presence while you focus exclusively on shipping high-quality, profitable code.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is filled with developers who could build anything but couldn't sell a thing. You spend 80% of your time hunting for leads or drafting mediocre copy, leaving you drained and behind schedule. It is a silent killer of potential, turning high-value technical talent into an undervalued commodity.

But what if your development environment did the heavy lifting for you? By utilizing Claude Code as an autonomous agent and Antigravity as your orchestration layer, you turn your terminal into a marketing powerhouse. We are moving beyond manual workflows; we are building an automated system that turns your technical expertise into a visible, client-attracting asset.

steps.title: Configure the Claude Code Environment
steps.description: Initialize Claude Code in your project root to grant the agent context-aware access to your codebase and project goals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project structure and identify the most marketable features that would appeal to non-technical stakeholders.
steps.claude_code_command: claude init && claude config set context_window 200k

steps.title: Automate Content Strategy Generation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to parse your code comments and generate high-converting blog posts or social copy that highlights your technical prowess.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a 3-part LinkedIn content series based on the technical challenges solved in this repository's README.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate marketing content from README.md"

steps.title: Build a High-Conversion Landing Page
steps.description: Deploy a clean, professional landing page that showcases your current project, utilizing Claude Code to write the copy and layout.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive landing page structure using Tailwind CSS that emphasizes the business outcomes of this codebase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create index.html with Tailwind and SEO meta tags for project launch"

steps.title: Implement Automated Outreach Scripts
steps.description: Create small CLI utilities that identify potential client pain points based on your project's specific technical niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a personalized outreach template for potential clients that highlights the specific performance optimizations implemented here.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create outreach_template.txt based on performance metrics"

steps.title: Set Up Continuous Marketing Loops
steps.description: Integrate your marketing tasks into your build pipeline so that every commit triggers a documentation or marketing update.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Github Action script that triggers a documentation update whenever the main branch is pushed.

pro_tips: Always use the 'review' flag in Claude Code to audit generated marketing copy for tone consistency before pushing to production.
Store your brand voice guidelines in a 'brand_voice.md' file in the root directory so Claude Code references it for every task.
Use Antigravity's 'context-injection' to feed your previous client testimonials into Claude Code for more persuasive copy.
Leverage the 'diff' feature in Claude Code to iterate on marketing copy without manually overwriting your existing project files.
Automate the creation of a 'Portfolio-Ready' folder where Claude Code periodically moves your best-documented code snippets.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, schedule a weekly 30-minute block to review the automated content generated by your pipeline and push it to your social channels.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to out-market the competition. Stop building in silence and start scaling your freelance presence today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
